included_prs.title: Add Copy text option to wave drop mobile menu
included_prs.risk: low - additive mobile action-sheet item plus verbatim helper extraction; touched files shared with desktop copy path
included_prs.validation_slice: wave drop mobile menu copy actions + wave chat routes

pack_plan.description: Read-only core route smoke pack for deployed web health.
Read-only route, navigation, search, network, and delegation surface matrix.
Read-only WCAG/i18n route evidence pack for deployed public routes.

durable_artifacts.notes: Retained deployment evidence belongs on 6529-controlled artifact storage. Git LFS and committed generated artifacts are not durable evidence stores.

auto_hold_criteria.hold_when: Any required validation pack records status failed, blocked, or timed_out.
auto_hold_criteria.recovery: Fix forward or rerun once with evidence; repeated failures hold production.

auto_hold_criteria.hold_when: A terminal passed/released manifest is missing a passed check for any required validation pack.
auto_hold_criteria.recovery: Run the missing pack or record a release-captain exception before promotion.

auto_hold_criteria.hold_when: A production-eligible terminal manifest lacks approved durable artifact pointers.
auto_hold_criteria.recovery: Upload redacted evidence to approved storage and record the URI, hash/CID/ETag, retention, and redaction status.

auto_hold_criteria.hold_when: A standard required validation pack's latest passing check does not record the expected pack-plan command.
auto_hold_criteria.recovery: Rerun the standard command or record a release-captain exception outside the standard pack.

auto_hold_criteria.hold_when: A standard required validation pack's latest passing check does not list all required pack-plan surfaces.
auto_hold_criteria.recovery: Rerun the full pack or record all covered surfaces before promotion.

auto_hold_criteria.hold_when: Production candidate SHA differs from current origin/main or from the staging-validated release set.
auto_hold_criteria.recovery: Rerun staging for the current candidate or remove superseded work from the train.

auto_hold_criteria.hold_when: A production release manifest lacks a passed release-captain-validation checkpoint with evidence.
auto_hold_criteria.recovery: Run production-safe validation, then record the release-captain-validation checkpoint with canonical evidence before release notes.

post_deploy_watch.notes: Post-deploy watch records health evidence before release notes. It is separate from traffic-split canary rollout.

canary_readiness.feature_flag_strategy: App-specific flags only; no deployment-bus traffic splitting.
canary_readiness.notes: Current deployment bus supports auto-hold plus explicit watch. Traffic-split canary rollout is a future infrastructure capability.

plans.rollback: Use the release captain decision log to choose rollback or fix-forward before production promotion.
plans.fix_forward: Fix through the normal PR path, merge to origin/main, redeploy staging, and rerun failed validation.
